howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Transmission Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately

steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after road test approval
items.body: Ask when they feel the shift points.

items.heading: Private first for warranty comebacks
items.body: Give techs room to diagnose before Google hears it.
